description.unified: Deals ATK Magic DMG to enemies in a frontal area 3 times, pushing them back, and reduces their ATK Spd by 15% [30%->15%] and Magic DEF by 10% [35%->10%] for 4sec. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals additional ATK Magic DMG.

Deals ATK Magic DMG to 2 enemy and inflicts Bind [roots->Bind] for 2sec [3.6 sec->2sec]. The damaged enemy takes 18% ATK Magic DoT every 0.5sec for 6sec, and Magic DMG taken is increased by 20% [30%->20%].
Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals ATK Magic DMG 5 times. The final hit stuns enemies for 1sec [1.8 sec->1sec]. Against non-hero enemies, deals additional ATK Magic DMG.

Increases Critical Hit Chance by 150. Each time damage is dealt, applies [Lea's Curse] to the target for 10sec. [Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by 100 [250->100], and ATK is reduced by 10% [25%->10%].

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by 100% [80%->100%].

dark.unified: Roots the target for 1 sec [1.2 sec->1 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 2000 [1000->2000], but the target is changed to all enemies.

dark.unified: Root duration increases by 2 sec [0.9 sec->2 sec].

light.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 15% [25%->15%] for 10 sec.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1000.]

light.unified: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by 10% [{2}%->10%]. This effect stacks up to 5 [{3}->5] times and cannot be dispelled.

dark.unified: Reduces the target’s Magic Critical Resistance by 20% [25%->20%] for 10 sec.

description.unified: [Area of Darkness] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last attack reduces the target’s M.DEF by 30% for 7 sec.

dark.unified: On critical hit, reduces the target’s Status Resistance by 200 [250->200] for 10 sec, and reduces the cooldown of all skills except the skill in use by 2%.

description.unified: Upon a Critical Hit, reduces the target's Healing Rate by 35% [50%->35%] for 10 sec and increases own Critical Damage by {0}%. The Critical Damage increase effect stacks up to 20 times.
